scripts.build: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./input.css -o ./style.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let html=fs.readFileSync('index.html', 'utf8'); const css=fs.readFileSync('style.css', 'utf8'); html=html.replace('<link rel=\x22stylesheet\x22 href=\x22style.css\x22>', '<style>' + css + '</style>'); fs.writeFileSync('index.html', html);"
